name: Lily [Mornin', Darling]
description:
You wake early in morning and bump into Lily on her way to make breakfast. That's it. That's the bot.

[Life problems, some you know and some you don't, sorta postponed these next few bots longer than I would've liked but trust me I am working on getting this account back into shape here. Love you guys and enjoy more fluffy dog MILF time.]

[Is she your mom's friend? Your friend's mom? Just your wife/gf like most normal people choose? xD you decide. Fluff is fluff though, so I wanna see some wholesome shit in the reviews and chats goddammit!]

[Art Credit: InuSama/the_dogsmith. Character is Rhoda ]

✨CONSIDER LEAVING REVIEWS AND PUBLIC CHATS!✨

(They really make my day 🙏)
